Bash(powershell -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms, System.Drawing; \\$bounds = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; \\$bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(\\$bounds.Width, \\$bounds.Height\); \\$graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\(\\$bitmap\); \\$graphics.CopyFromScreen\(\\$bounds.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, \\$bounds.Size\); \\$bitmap.Save\('C:\\01 클로드코드\\40-10 GEO-AIO 콘텐츠\\screenshot_gsc.png', [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); \\$graphics.Dispose\(\); \\$bitmap.Dispose\(\)")

Bash(powershell -File - <<'PSEOF'
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms, System.Drawing
$bounds = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds
$bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($bounds.Width, $bounds.Height\)
$graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bitmap\)
$graphics.CopyFromScreen\($bounds.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $bounds.Size\)
$bitmap.Save\("C:\\01 클로드코드\\40-10 GEO-AIO 콘텐츠\\screenshot_gsc.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\)
$graphics.Dispose\(\)
$bitmap.Dispose\(\)
PSEOF)

Bash(powershell -File - <<'PSEOF'
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms, System.Drawing
$bounds = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds
$bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($bounds.Width, $bounds.Height\)
$graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bitmap\)
$graphics.CopyFromScreen\($bounds.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $bounds.Size\)
$bitmap.Save\("C:\\tmp_gsc_screenshot.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\)
$graphics.Dispose\(\)
$bitmap.Dispose\(\)
PSEOF)
